title: Mobile Developer
desc: Developed and maintained the Redeem mobile application, a corporate fuel control and fleet management platform. Implemented secure QR-based refueling transactions, geolocated maps for finding partner gas stations, and automated tracking modules for driver fuel limits and analytics.

title: Mobile Developer
desc: Focused primarily on architecting and developing a comprehensive enterprise ERP system, including integrated POS, B2B automation, and sales CRM modules. Engineered bookkeeping and accounting features inspired by 1C database patterns.

title: Mobile Developer
desc: Developed high-performance mobile applications, focusing on low-latency live streaming integration (RTMP & WebRTC) and complex layout redesigns from Figma. Implemented custom calculator engines and localized client-server synchronization. Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams to deliver production-ready features.
